languages.text: "Позже нам надо будет поговорить. Одна короткая беседа там, где безопасно. Если такое место здесь вообще существует".
"We must talk later. A brief conversation. Somewhere secure. If there is such a place here."
languages.original_text: "Позже нам надо будет поговорить. Одна короткая беседа там, где безопасно. Если такое место здесь вообще существует".

traits.locale_text: "We must talk later. A brief conversation. Somewhere secure. If there is such a place here."
"We must talk later. A brief conversation. Somewhere secure. If there is such a place here."
"We must talk later. A brief conversation. Somewhere secure. If there is such a place here."
"We must talk later. A brief conversation. Somewhere secure. If there is such a place here."
"We must talk later. A brief conversation. Somewhere secure. If there is such a place here."

languages.text: 「後で話しましょう。手短に。どこか安全な場所で。ここにそのような場所があればですが」
languages.original_text: "We must talk later. A brief conversation. Somewhere secure. If there is such a place here."

traits.locale_text: 「後で話しましょう。手短に。どこか安全な場所で。ここにそのような場所があればですが」

languages.text: "Wir müssen nachher reden. Nur ein kurzes Gespräch. An einem sicheren Ort. Falls es so etwas hier gibt."
languages.original_text: "We must talk later. A brief conversation. Somewhere secure. If there is such a place here."

traits.locale_text: "Wir müssen nachher reden. Nur ein kurzes Gespräch. An einem sicheren Ort. Falls es so etwas hier gibt."

languages.text: « J'aimerais vous parler, plus tard. Brièvement. Et idéalement, dans un endroit discret. Si tant est que cela existe, par ici. »
languages.original_text: "We must talk later. A brief conversation. Somewhere secure. If there is such a place here."

traits.locale_text: « J'aimerais vous parler, plus tard. Brièvement. Et idéalement, dans un endroit discret. Si tant est que cela existe, par ici. »

languages.text: «Tenemos que hablar, pero luego. Será una conversación breve. En algún lugar que sea seguro. Si es que existe algún lugar semejante aquí».
languages.original_text: "We must talk later. A brief conversation. Somewhere secure. If there is such a place here."

traits.locale_text: «Tenemos que hablar, pero luego. Será una conversación breve. En algún lugar que sea seguro. Si es que existe algún lugar semejante aquí».

languages.text: “我们之后得再谈谈，找个安全的地方简单谈两句，假如这里真的有安全的地方。”
languages.original_text: "We must talk later. A brief conversation. Somewhere secure. If there is such a place here."

traits.locale_text: “我们之后得再谈谈，找个安全的地方简单谈两句，假如这里真的有安全的地方。”

languages.text: "Daha sonra konuşalım. Kısa bir konuşma olacak. Güvenli bir yerde. Tabii burada öyle bir yer varsa."
languages.original_text: "We must talk later. A brief conversation. Somewhere secure. If there is such a place here."

traits.locale_text: "Daha sonra konuşalım. Kısa bir konuşma olacak. Güvenli bir yerde. Tabii burada öyle bir yer varsa."
